project.description: The Nx project name to tag (e.g. bcew-blocks).

version.description: Semantic version to tag (e.g. 1.2.3 or v1.2.3). Must be Composer-compatible semver.

remote.description: Push the tag to a given remote after creating it.
remote.x-prompt: Push the tag to a given remote, eg 'origin'? Leave blank to create the tag locally without pushing.
